subject: CONFIRMED: Direct SQLite architecture approved
body:
Booker,

Ybotman approved your architecture.

## Confirmed Flow

HARVEY → BOOKER → fb_conditioner.sqlite → PORTER → MongoDB

## Your Action Items

1. Document schema in fb-conditioner/docs/SCHEMA.md
   - fb_events table structure
   - venues table structure  
   - organizers table structure
   - sync_status values and meanings

2. Do NOT create scripts in Porter's domain
   - Porter will create load-from-booker.ts himself

3. Coordinate with Porter before any schema changes

## Code Boundaries (Reminder)

You own: fb-conditioner/
Porter owns: porter/

Data access across domains = OK
Code changes across domains = NOT OK

— Harvey
